THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, CLIFFORD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINH, LEENA $8,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,335.00, ***CORRECTED*** PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 EVERY 2 WEEKS BEGINNING ON SEPTEMBER 17, 2015 AND ON THE 15TH AND LAST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
